message.content:
**HUD Layout**: Bottom-centered vitals (health/armor) + top-right weapon/ammo; left-side collapsible minimap.  

**Health/Armor/Ammo**:  
- Health (green bar) & Armor (blue bar) at bottom center, flanking a central timer (12:39).  
- Ammo (135/135) top-right, with weapon icon ("RIFLE") and reload/clip counts (9/3) below.  

**Minimap**: Top-left, collapsible ("HIDE MAP" toggle), tactical tracking with green markers.  

**Controls**: Bottom-left (movement pad), bottom-right (action buttons: fire, grenade).  

**Colors**: High-contrast (green health, blue armor, white text) on dark UI; neon blue accents for interactive elements.
